title: Jamaican Grape Casserole
description: A sweet and savory vegan casserole inspired by Jamaican flavors.

ingredients.name: Tender
ingredients.amount: 1 cup, cubed (such as jackfruit or portobello mushrooms)

instructions: In a large skillet, heat coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the cubed tender and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, Jamaican allspice, and nutritional yeast to the skillet. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix the casserole mix with water according to package instructions.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of the casserole mixture.
Top the casserole mixture with the grape halves.
Add the tender and tomato mixture on top of the grapes.
Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of casserole mixture on top.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and the top is golden brown.
